# Offline PokerKit Docs

This directory vendors a local snapshot of the PokerKit text docs so agent workspaces do not need internet access.

Recommended reading order:
- `README.rst`
- `index.rst`
- `examples.rst`
- `tips.rst`
- `reference.rst`

Other included docs:
- `simulation.rst`
- `evaluation.rst`
- `notation.rst`
- `analysis.rst`
- `changelog.rst`
